stemHtml: Name the most important parts of the eye in the order they are met by the light entering the eye, until it reaches the visual cortex.

options.a: Cornea, lens, iris and pupil, retina.
options.b: Lens, iris and pupil, cornea, retina.
options.c: Cornea, iris and pupil, lens, retina.
options.d: Lens, iris and pupil, retina, cornea.
